'''rahugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jyotirlinga|jyotirlinga]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jyotirlinga|jyotirlinga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rahugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhigith|ræhigith]] || [[word:ræhigij|ræhigij]] || [[word:ræhigish|ræhigish]] || [[word:ræhigi|ræhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahuhuguth|rahuhuguth]] || [[word:rahuhuguj|rahuhuguj]] || [[word:rahuhugush|rahuhugush]] || [[word:rahuhugu|rahuhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahuguth|rahuguth]] || [[word:rahuguj|rahuguj]] || [[word:rahugush|rahugush]] || [[word:rahugu|rahugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahufguth|rahufguth]] || [[word:rahufguj|rahufguj]] || [[word:rahufgush|rahufgush]] || [[word:rahufguf|rahufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahuguthu|rahuguthu]] || [[word:rahuguju|rahuguju]] || [[word:rahugushu|rahugushu]] || [[word:rahuguku|rahuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahuguth|rahuguth]] || [[word:rahuguj|rahuguj]] || [[word:rahugush|rahugush]] || [[word:rahugu|rahugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahuguthul|rahuguthul]] || [[word:rahugujul|rahugujul]] || [[word:rahugushul|rahugushul]] || [[word:rahugukul|rahugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahuguthuthu|rahuguthuthu]] || [[word:rahugujuju|rahugujuju]] || [[word:rahugushushu|rahugushushu]] || [[word:rahuguku|rahuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahuguthun|rahuguthun]] || [[word:rahugujun|rahugujun]] || [[word:rahugushun|rahugushun]] || [[word:rahugukun|rahugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahuguthuoro|rahuguthuoro]] || [[word:rahugujuoro|rahugujuoro]] || [[word:rahugushuoro|rahugushuoro]] || [[word:rahugukuoro|rahugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
